name: Makita 18V LXT Sub-Compact Brushless 1/2" Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: Makita's sub-compact drill driver is tiny at under 6 inches long, making it the go-to choice for work in tight spaces. It weighs just 2.8 lbs with a battery, so your arm won't fatigue on a full day of drilling. Despite its size, the brushless motor still delivers 350 in-lbs of torque -- plenty for most DIY tasks.
features: Only 5-7/8 inches long -- fits in tight joist bays and cabinets
Brushless motor for up to 50% longer run time vs brushed models
Compatible with all Makita 18V LXT batteries

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2" Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: The standard-size brushless drill driver in Makita's LXT lineup. It hits a sweet spot of power, size, and price for most drilling and driving tasks around the house or jobsite.
features: Brushless motor delivers 530 in-lbs of max torque
LED light with afterglow illuminates the work area
Compatible with all Makita 18V LXT batteries

name: Makita 18V LXT Sub-Compact Brushless 1/2" Hammer Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: The sub-compact hammer drill adds a hammer function for drilling into masonry and concrete while staying compact enough for tight spaces. At 6-1/2 inches long, it's one of the smallest hammer drills you can buy.
features: Compact 6-1/2 inch length for tight quarters
Hammer mode for drilling into concrete and masonry
Brushless motor for longer run time and tool life
Compatible with all Makita 18V LXT batteries

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2" Hammer Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: Makita's full-size brushless hammer drill has the power to handle demanding drilling and fastening in wood, metal, and masonry. Its three-mode selector lets you switch between drill, hammer drill, and drive modes.
features: Brushless motor delivers 530 in-lbs of max torque
Extreme Protection Technology (XPT) for dust and water resistance

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 4-Speed Impact Driver (Tool Only)
description: Makita's top 18V impact driver features Quick-Shift Mode that reduces impacting during fastening to help prevent overdriving and damage to work surfaces. The 4-speed selector gives you precise control from delicate fastening to max power.
features: Quick-Shift Mode reduces rotation and impact speed for less overdriving

name: Makita 18V LXT Sub-Compact Brushless Impact Driver (Tool Only)
description: The sub-compact impact driver is incredibly small at 5-1/4 inches and weighs just 2.6 lbs. Perfect for cabinet work, furniture assembly, and anywhere space is tight. Still delivers 1,240 in-lbs of torque -- enough for most fastening tasks.
features: Only 5-1/4 inches long -- the most compact in its class
Variable 2-speed for a wide range of fastening
One-touch bit holder for quick bit changes

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 3-Speed Impact Driver (Tool Only)
description: The mid-range 18V LXT impact driver with 3-speed selection delivers excellent performance for general fastening. It sits between the sub-compact and Quick-Shift models in the lineup.
features: 3-speed power selection for precise fastening control
Brushless motor for longer runtime and tool life
Compatible with all Makita 18V LXT batteries

name: Makita 18V LXT High Torque 1/2" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
description: The big 1/2-inch impact wrench for automotive work and heavy fastening. It delivers 740 ft-lbs of fastening torque and 1,180 ft-lbs of breakaway torque, enough to handle lug nuts, suspension bolts, and most automotive work.

name: Makita 18V LXT 3/8" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
description: A compact 3/8-inch impact wrench ideal for lighter automotive tasks, plumbing, and mechanical work where the 1/2-inch model would be overkill.

name: Makita 18V LXT 1" SDS-Plus Rotary Hammer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless rotary hammer for drilling into concrete, masonry, and stone without a cord. Uses SDS-Plus bits and has three modes: hammer drill, rotation only, and hammer only for chipping.
features: 3-mode operation: hammer drill, rotation only, hammer only
SDS-Plus chuck for quick bit changes

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 6-1/2" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: The most popular cordless circular saw in Makita's LXT lineup. The 6-1/2-inch blade handles 2x lumber at 90 degrees and the brushless motor delivers 5,000 RPM for clean, fast cuts. Electric brake stops the blade quickly for safety.
features: 6-1/2 inch blade cuts 2x lumber at 90 degrees
Electric brake for quick blade stops
Magnesium shoe and blade guards for lightweight durability
Built-in LED light illuminates the cut line

name: Makita 18V LXT 6-1/2" Lightweight Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: The budget-friendly cordless circular saw in Makita's lineup. It uses a standard brushed motor but still delivers clean cuts in 2x lumber. At under $150 (tool only), it's a solid choice for occasional use.
features: Built-in dust blower clears cut line

name: Makita 18V LXT 5-3/8" Circular Trim Saw (Tool Only)
description: A compact circular trim saw for lighter cutting tasks. The 5-3/8-inch blade won't cut through a 2x4 in one pass, but it's great for plywood, paneling, and trim work where a full-size saw is too bulky.
features: 5-3/8 inch blade for trim and sheet goods

name: Makita 18V X2 LXT (36V) Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: Uses two 18V batteries for 36V of power, giving you a full-size 7-1/4-inch cordless circular saw that rivals corded models. This is the saw to get if you need to cut through 2x lumber all day without plugging in.
features: Uses two 18V LXT batteries for 36V power
7-1/4 inch blade cuts 2-1/2 inches deep at 90 degrees

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
description: Makita's brushless recip saw delivers fast, aggressive cutting for demolition, remodeling, and pruning. Variable speed trigger and shoe adjust give you control for precision cuts too.
features: Brushless motor for up to 50% longer runtime
Shoe adjusts for longer blade life

name: Makita 18V LXT Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
description: The budget reciprocating saw in the LXT lineup. It uses a brushed motor so runtime is shorter, but the lower price makes it a great entry point for occasional demolition and pruning work.

name: Makita 18V LXT Jig Saw (Tool Only)
description: A versatile cordless jig saw for curved cuts in wood, metal, and plastic. The D-handle design gives solid control and the orbital action lets you adjust cutting aggressiveness.
features: LED light illuminates the cut line

name: Makita 18V LXT Barrel Grip Jig Saw (Tool Only)
description: The barrel-grip jig saw offers better visibility and control than D-handle models. Preferred by pros for detail work and countertop cutouts. Brushless motor and variable speed up to 3,500 SPM.
features: Barrel grip design for superior control
On-board dust port connects to vacuum

name: Makita 18V LXT Compact Brushless Band Saw (Tool Only)
description: A portable band saw for clean, burr-free cuts in pipe, conduit, threaded rod, and other materials. Much cleaner than a recip saw for plumbing and metalwork.
features: Compact one-hand design for tight spaces

name: Makita 18V LXT Portable Band Saw (Tool Only)
description: A larger portable band saw with 4-3/4 inch round cutting capacity for heavier pipe and structural material. Two-hand design for stability on bigger cuts.

name: Makita 18V LXT Cut-Out Saw (Tool Only)
description: A cordless rotary cut-out tool for drywall, plywood, and thin paneling. Spins at 30,000 RPM for clean cuts when installing outlets, switches, and fixtures.

name: Makita 18V X2 LXT (36V) Brushless 10" Dual-Bevel Sliding Compound Miter Saw (Tool Only)
description: A full-size cordless miter saw powered by two 18V batteries. It cuts up to 12 inches wide at 90 degrees and features Automatic Speed Change technology that adjusts speed and torque under load.
features: Automatic Speed Change adjusts under load
Up to 334 crosscuts per charge in 2x4 SPF

name: Makita 18V X2 LXT (36V) Brushless 12" Dual-Bevel Sliding Compound Miter Saw (Tool Only)
description: The largest cordless miter saw in the LXT lineup. The 12-inch blade handles wide boards and crown molding up to 8 inches nested. Uses two 18V batteries for 36V of sustained power.
features: 12 inch blade for 15 inch crosscuts at 90 degrees
AWS compatible for dust extraction sync

name: Makita 18V X2 LXT (36V) Brushless 6-1/2" Plunge Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: A cordless plunge-cut track saw for ultra-precise, splinter-free cuts in plywood, MDF, and solid wood. When paired with a guide rail, it replaces a table saw for sheet goods with cleaner results.
features: Works with Makita guide rail system (sold separately)

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 4-1/2" / 5" Cut-Off/Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
description: The standard cordless angle grinder for cutting and grinding metal, tile, and concrete. The brushless motor delivers 8,500 RPM and the slide switch prevents accidental starts.
features: Automatic Speed Change adjusts under load
Electric brake stops wheel in 2 seconds
Active Feedback Sensing shuts off motor if rotation is stopped

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 4-1/2" Paddle Switch Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
description: A paddle-switch angle grinder that shuts off when you release the trigger -- the safer choice for grinding and cutting tasks. Same motor as the slide-switch model.
features: Paddle switch shuts off when released for safety

name: Makita 18V LXT 5" Random Orbit Sander (Tool Only)
description: A cordless random orbit sander for smoothing wood surfaces before finishing. Produces a swirl-free finish and connects to a dust bag or vacuum for clean sanding.
features: Hook-and-loop pad for quick disc changes

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 3/8" x 21" Detail Belt Sander (Tool Only)
description: A detail belt sander for precision sanding in tight spots. The narrow 3/8-inch belt gets into corners and contours where random orbit sanders can't reach.
features: 3/8 inch x 21 inch belt for detail work

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Drywall Sander (Tool Only)
description: A cordless drywall sander that eliminates the need for a cord on the ceiling. The 9-inch sanding head covers large areas quickly, and AWS compatibility lets it auto-start a connected dust extractor.
features: AWS compatible for auto-start dust extraction
LED light ring around sanding pad

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Compact Router (Tool Only)
description: One of the most popular cordless routers on the market. The brushless motor delivers 30,000 RPM for clean edge profiles, dado cuts, and decorative routing. Compatible with standard router bases and guides.
features: Fine depth adjustment with micro dial

name: Makita 18V LXT 3-1/4" Cordless Planer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless planer for smoothing and dimensioning lumber. The 3-1/4-inch wide cutting head handles standard lumber widths and the depth adjustment lets you take fine shavings.
features: Kickstand locks up for stable placement

name: Makita 18V LXT Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
description: An oscillating multi-tool for cutting, sanding, scraping, and grinding in tight spots. Accepts OIS and Starlock accessories. Essential for remodeling work.

name: Makita 18V LXT Sub-Compact Brushless StarlockMax Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
description: The premium multi-tool in the LXT lineup. The brushless motor and StarlockMax interface accept the largest oscillating accessories for more aggressive cutting. Sub-compact design fits into tight spaces.

name: Makita 18V LXT 2" Brad Nailer 18 Gauge (Tool Only)
description: A cordless brad nailer that fires 18-gauge brads up to 2 inches long. No compressor, no hose -- just point and shoot. Drives up to 1,660 nails per charge with a 5.0Ah battery.

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 2" Brad Nailer 18 Gauge (Tool Only)
description: The upgraded brushless brad nailer fires 2x faster than the previous model and drives up to 4,250 nails per charge. The brushless motor also runs cooler and lasts longer.
features: 2x faster nailing speed vs previous model
Anti-dry fire mechanism prevents blank shots

name: Makita 18V LXT 2-1/2" Straight Finish Nailer 16 Gauge (Tool Only)
description: A cordless 16-gauge straight finish nailer for trim work, baseboards, and crown molding. Delivers 1.5x faster nailing than previous models and sinks nails sub-flush in hardwood.

name: Makita 18V LXT 2-1/2" Angled Finish Nailer 16 Gauge (Tool Only)
description: An angled 16-gauge finish nailer for getting into tight corners where a straight nailer won't fit. The 34-degree magazine angle is perfect for inside corners and toe-nailing.

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 21-Degree 3-1/2" Framing Nailer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless framing nailer that drives 3-1/2-inch full round head nails without a compressor. The 21-degree magazine accepts widely available nail strips for framing, sheathing, and deck building.
features: Brushless motor for consistent driving power
No compressor, hose, or gas cartridge

name: Makita 18V LXT 1/4" Narrow Crown Stapler 18 Gauge (Tool Only)
description: A cordless narrow crown stapler for upholstery, cabinet backs, and light trim. Fires 18-gauge 1/4-inch crown staples with 1.25x faster stapling than pneumatic competitors.

name: Makita 18V LXT 23 Gauge 1-3/8" Pin Nailer (Tool Only)
description: A 23-gauge pin nailer for delicate trim work where you need nearly invisible fastener holes. Pin nails are headless, so they leave a tiny hole that's easy to fill or often invisible entirely.
features: Ideal for thin trim, picture frames, and delicate moldings

name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless Caulk and Adhesive Gun (Tool Only)
description: A powered caulk gun for applying sealants, adhesives, and caulk without hand fatigue. Variable speed trigger gives you precise bead control. Handles both 10 oz and 20 oz cartridges.
features: Variable speed trigger for bead control
Anti-drip feature stops flow when trigger is released
Puncher and cutter built into base
Eliminates hand fatigue on large caulking jobs

name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless Grease Gun (Tool Only)
description: A cordless grease gun for automotive and equipment maintenance. Delivers up to 10,000 PSI of pressure and dispenses a full 14 oz cartridge per charge with a 2.0Ah battery.
features: Variable speed trigger for flow control
LED light for dark access points

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 2 Gal. HEPA Filter Portable Wet/Dry Dust Extractor/Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: A portable HEPA dust extractor that runs on a single 18V battery. Perfect for capturing fine dust from sanders, saws, and grinders. The HEPA filter captures 99.97% of particles.
features: HEPA filter captures 99.97% of particles 0.3 microns and larger
AWS compatible for auto-start with tools

name: Makita 18V LXT Compact Cordless Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: A compact stick vacuum for quick cleanups in the shop, truck, or around the house. Lightweight and portable with a nozzle attachment for getting into tight spaces.

name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless Inflator (Tool Only)
description: A cordless inflator for car tires, bike tires, sports balls, and air mattresses. Digital gauge with preset pressure and auto-shutoff makes it easy to inflate to the exact pressure you need.
features: Digital pressure gauge with preset feature

name: Makita 18V LXT LED Flashlight/Spotlight
description: A powerful LED flashlight/spotlight that runs on 18V LXT batteries. Delivers up to 1,250 lumens with four brightness modes. Perfect for working in dark areas or as an emergency light.
features: Up to 18 hours runtime on low setting

name: Makita 18V LXT LED Flashlight
description: A compact LED flashlight that runs on 18V LXT batteries. At $75 it's one of the cheapest ways to add lighting to your Makita battery collection.

name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless 9" Fan (Tool Only)
description: A cordless fan for keeping cool on the jobsite or in the garage. Three speed settings and a pivoting head let you direct airflow where you need it.
features: Runs up to 13.5 hours on low (5.0Ah battery)

name: Makita 18V LXT Cordless Bluetooth Job Site Speaker
description: A rugged Bluetooth speaker that runs on 18V LXT batteries. IP65-rated for dust and water resistance, so it can handle the jobsite. Good sound quality for its size.
features: Runs on 18V LXT batteries or AC power
Up to 20 hours playback on 5.0Ah battery

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless Cordless Blower (Tool Only)
description: A compact cordless blower for clearing leaves, grass clippings, and debris. Not as powerful as 36V or 56V models but lighter and good enough for small to medium yards.
features: Variable speed trigger with cruise control

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 24" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless hedge trimmer for maintaining hedges and bushes. The 24-inch dual-action blade cuts branches up to 3/4-inch thick with 4,000 strokes per minute.
features: Rotating rear handle for comfortable cutting

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 30" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The longer 30-inch version of Makita's cordless hedge trimmer. The extra blade length covers more with each pass, making it faster for large hedges.

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 13" String Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: A compact cordless string trimmer powered by a single 18V battery. The 13-inch cutting width is sufficient for small to medium yards. Lighter than 36V and 56V trimmers.
features: Bump-feed head for easy line loading
Telescoping shaft adjusts to user height
Converts to edger with accessory (sold separately)

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 6" Pruning Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: A compact pruning chainsaw for small limb removal and yard cleanup. The 6-inch bar is ideal for branches up to about 5 inches. One-hand operation and top-handle design make it easy to use overhead.
features: 6-inch bar for pruning and limb removal
Brushless motor for fast chain speed

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 12" Top Handle Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: A 12-inch chainsaw for moderate cutting tasks. The top-handle design and single-battery power make it lighter and more maneuverable than larger saws, ideal for firewood and storm cleanup.
features: Front hand guard with chain brake

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 24" Hedge Trimmer Kit
description: A premium 24-inch hedge trimmer kit that includes a 5.0Ah battery and rapid charger. The enhanced blade design cuts branches up to 7/8 inch, and the shear blade design makes clean cuts.
features: 24-inch shear blade design for clean cuts

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 2-Tool Combo Kit (Hammer Drill + Impact Driver)
description: Makita's most popular combo kit includes the XPH12Z hammer drill and XDT14Z impact driver with two 4.0Ah batteries, dual-port charger, and bag. Everything you need to get started in the Makita ecosystem.
features: Includes hammer drill (530 in-lbs) and impact driver (1,550 in-lbs)
Both tools are brushless for long life and runtime

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 2-Tool Combo Kit (5.0Ah)
description: The premium 2-piece combo with larger 5.0Ah batteries for extended runtime. Includes Makita's top hammer drill and impact driver with Quick-Shift Mode.
features: Premium hammer drill and Quick-Shift impact driver
Best entry point for serious Makita users

name: Makita 18V LXT 5-Tool Combo Kit (3.0Ah)
description: A 5-tool starter kit that covers the basics: drill/driver, impact driver, reciprocating saw, circular saw, and flashlight. Uses brushed motors to keep the price down, making it a great budget entry into the Makita ecosystem.
features: Includes drill/driver, impact driver, recip saw, circ saw, flashlight
All tools share the same 18V LXT batteries
Best value for getting started with Makita

name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless High Speed Blower/Inflator (Tool Only)
description: A dual-purpose blower and inflator for cleaning workshop surfaces and inflating air mattresses, pool toys, and small tires. Not to be confused with the outdoor leaf blower -- this is a precision shop tool.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 1/2" Hammer Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: The compact XGT hammer drill delivers impressive power in a small package. The 40V battery provides more sustained torque than 18V models, making it ideal for heavy-duty drilling in concrete and masonry.
features: XPT extreme protection for dust and water

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 1/2" Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
description: The high-output XGT driver-drill delivers 1,240 in-lbs of torque -- more than double most 18V drills. Built for demanding applications like self-feed bits and mixing compounds.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 4-Speed Impact Driver (Tool Only)
description: The XGT impact driver delivers 1,770 in-lbs of torque with 4-speed power selection. The 40V platform provides consistent power even under heavy load.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 1-1/8" SDS-Plus Rotary Hammer (Tool Only)
description: The XGT rotary hammer delivers 2.5 ft-lbs of impact energy for serious concrete work. The 40V battery provides the sustained power needed for long drilling sessions in hard materials.
features: 3-mode: hammer drill, rotation only, hammer only
AWS compatible for dust extraction sync
SDS-Plus chuck for quick bit changes

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 1-9/16" SDS-Max Rotary Hammer (Tool Only)
description: The heavy-duty SDS-Max rotary hammer for large-diameter holes and demolition. Delivers 5.5 ft-lbs of impact energy, making it the most powerful cordless rotary hammer in Makita's lineup.
features: 5.5 ft-lbs impact energy for heavy-duty work

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 4-Speed 1/2" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
description: A 40V impact wrench with 1/2-inch drive and friction ring anvil. The 4-speed selector covers everything from careful bolt snugging to maximum breakaway torque.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 4-Speed 3/4" High-Torque Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
description: The heavy-duty 3/4-inch impact wrench for industrial and heavy automotive work. Delivers 1,330 ft-lbs of fastening torque and 1,510 ft-lbs of breakaway torque.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: A full-size 7-1/4-inch cordless circular saw powered by a single 40V battery (vs. the 18V model that needs two batteries). Delivers 5,100 RPM for fast, clean cuts through 2x lumber.
features: Full-size 7-1/4 inch blade on a single battery

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 7-1/4" Rear Handle Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: A rear-handle (worm-drive style) circular saw with the ergonomics preferred by framers and pros. The XGT motor delivers 5,500 RPM for aggressive cutting through framing lumber.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 10-1/4" Rear Handle Circular Saw (Tool Only)
description: A massive 10-1/4-inch cordless circular saw that can cut through 4x material in a single pass. The rear-handle design keeps the weight balanced for accurate cuts even at this size.
features: 10-1/4 inch blade cuts 3-7/8 inches deep at 90 degrees
Cuts through 4x material in one pass

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
description: The XGT reciprocating saw delivers more sustained power than 18V models for heavy-duty demolition and remodeling. The 40V motor maintains cutting speed even in thick materials.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless Orbital Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
description: The premium XGT recip saw with orbital action for faster cutting in wood. The orbital setting makes the blade move in an elliptical pattern for more aggressive material removal.
features: Orbital action for faster wood cutting
Tool-less blade change with shoe pivot

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless Jig Saw (Tool Only)
description: The XGT jig saw combines precision and power with the efficiency of a 40V brushless motor. Variable speed and orbital settings give you control over cut quality and speed.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 4-1/2" / 5" Angle Grinder with AWS (Tool Only)
description: The XGT angle grinder with AWS (Auto-Start Wireless System) auto-starts a connected dust extractor when you pull the trigger. Variable speed from 3,000-8,500 RPM for different materials.
features: AWS compatible for auto-start dust extraction
Up to 60% faster cutting vs 18V models

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 7" / 9" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
description: A large-format angle grinder for heavy grinding and cutting in metal and concrete. The 7 or 9-inch disc handles jobs that smaller grinders can't, like cutting rebar or grinding welds on structural steel.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 3-1/4" Planer with AWS (Tool Only)
description: The XGT planer delivers 15,000 RPM for the smoothest possible finish. AWS capability auto-starts a connected dust extractor for clean chip collection.
features: AWS compatible for auto-start dust extraction

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless Compact Router (Tool Only)
description: The XGT compact router delivers 31,000 RPM with more sustained power than the 18V model. Ideal for edge profiling, dado cuts, and decorative work with longer runtime.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 2.1 Gal. Wet/Dry Dust Extractor/Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: A compact XGT dust extractor for use with grinders, saws, and sanders. The 40V battery provides more suction and longer runtime than the 18V equivalent.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 4 Gal. Wet/Dry Dust Extractor/Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: The larger XGT dust extractor with 4-gallon capacity. Ideal for sustained dust collection on larger jobs without frequent emptying.
features: AWS compatible for auto-start with tools

name: Makita 40V max XGT LED Lantern/Flashlight
description: A versatile LED lantern and flashlight combo that runs on XGT 40V batteries. The lantern mode provides 360-degree area lighting while the flashlight mode offers directional illumination.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Bluetooth Job Site Radio
description: A rugged Bluetooth-enabled job site radio that runs on XGT 40V batteries. Dust and water resistant for construction environments.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 15 lb SDS-Max Demolition Hammer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless demolition hammer for breaking up concrete, tile, and masonry. Delivers 8.3 ft-lbs of impact energy -- serious power for a battery-powered tool.

name: Makita 40V max XGT Brushless 2-Piece Combo Kit (2.5Ah)
description: The entry point into the XGT ecosystem: hammer drill and impact driver with two 2.5Ah batteries and rapid charger. Everything you need to start building your 40V collection.
